results.rendered_html:
ucita p. p.
1 Fit, proper, right, suitable; ucitastadupālaṃbhaḥ  U. 3 ; usually with inf.; ucitaṃ na te maṃgalakāle rodituṃ  Ś. 4. 
2 Usual, customary; uciteṣu karaṇīyeṣu  Ś. 4 , 7. 12 ;  K. 64 ;  M. 3. 3. 
3 Accustomed or used to, in comp.; nīvārabhāgadheyocitaiḥ  R. 1. 50 , 2. 25 ; 3. 54 , 60 ; 11. 9 ; caṃdanocitaḥ  Ki. 1. 34. 
4 Praiseworthy.
5 Delightful, agreeable, pleasurable.
6 Known, understood.
7 Entrusted, deposited.
8 Measured, accurate, adjusted (bhita).
9 Acceptable (grāhya).
